channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Will Hit 2% Of U.S. GDP In 2026, Analyst Says—Nearing Defense Spending Levels
item.description: AI spend, as a share of the nation’s GDP, is set to surpass projects like the moon landing and the build out of the Interstate Highway System. [Intel]

item.title: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index falls 2% as Broadcom’s forecast weighs on chipmakers
item.description: Broadcom's forecast miss highlights market sensitivity to AI growth expectations, potentially leading to cautious investor sentiment in the sector. The post Philadelphia Semiconductor Index falls 2% as Broadcom’s forecast weighs on chipmakers appeared first o… [Broadcom]

item.title: Meta is building data centers in tents to slash costs and accelerate AI infrastructure
item.description: Meta's tent-based data centers highlight a shift towards rapid, cost-effective AI infrastructure, but raise concerns about reliability and resilience. The post Meta is building data centers in tents to slash costs and accelerate AI infrastructure appeared fir… [Meta]

item.title: Plot Raises $10 Million To Scale Social Video Intelligence For Enterprise Marketing Teams
item.description: Plot, a social video intelligence platform used by major brands including Visa, Mastercard, PepsiCo, Fenty Beauty, Benefit Cosmetics, and CAVA, announced it has raised $10 million in seed funding. The round was co-led by XYZ Venture Capital and Mischief Ventu… [Intel]

item.title: Report: Following Google, Meta is considering a multi-billion-dollar equity financing to meet its AI-related capital expenditure needs. - 富途牛牛
item.description: Report: Following Google, Meta is considering a multi-billion-dollar equity financing to meet its AI-related capital expenditure needs. 富途牛牛 [Meta, Alphabet]

item.title: Apple's WWDC: Tim Cook's AI legacy at stake in his final developer conference as CEO
item.description: Apple heads into WWDC with Tim Cook’s AI legacy, Siri’s future as an agentic platform, and the stock’s rich valuation all on the line. [Apple]

item.title: Navitas Semiconductor Stock Faces Mixed Outlook in 2026 Amid AI Momentum and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Navitas Semiconductor has seen a 280% stock surge in 2026, driven by AI power innovations and a partnership with Nvidia. Analysts remain cautious about its valuation amidst high growth potential. [Nvidia]

item.title: Trump administration, OpenAI discussing possible government stake in the AI startup
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first shared the idea with the Trump administration in 2025, according to a source. [OpenAI]
